title: 「So as to…」句型
titleEn: Using So as to… to express purpose

source.file: Sentence Structure 81 -「So as to… 句——表達目的」.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Subject + main action + so as to + base verb + other information

formulas.formula: Subject + main action + so as to + base verb + other information
Subject + main action + so as not to + base verb + other information
Subject + main action + so as to + help / allow / enable + someone + verb

example: The wording was simplified so as to avoid confusion.
exampleZh: 措辭被簡化了，以避免混亂。

examples.en: The wording was simplified so as to avoid confusion.
examples.zh: 措辭被簡化了，以避免混亂。

examples.en: David spoke quietly so as not to wake the baby.
examples.zh: 大衛輕聲說話，以免吵醒嬰兒。

meaning.zh: So as to 表達有意達成的目的，回答「做這個行動的目的是甚麼？」。

rules.zh: So as to 表達「有意達成的目的」，不應用來描述純粹意外發生的結果。
rules.en: So as to expresses an intended purpose, not a purely accidental result.

rules.zh: So as to 後面使用動詞原形。
rules.en: Use the base form of the verb after so as to.

rules.zh: 否定目的使用 so as not to。
rules.en: Use so as not to for a negative purpose.

rules.zh: 注意兩個動作的執行者；如目的行動由另一個人執行，通常使用 help、allow 或 enable 等橋接動詞。
rules.en: Pay attention to who performs the main action and the purpose action.

rules.zh: So as to 和 in order to 很多情況下可以互換；so as to 通常較正式，而且常放在主要句子後面。
rules.en: So as to and in order to can often be exchanged, but so as to is more formal and normally follows the main clause.

rules.zh: So as to 的語氣比單純的 to 正式。
rules.en: So as to is more formal than a simple to-infinitive of purpose.

benefits.zh: So as to 能讓讀者立即知道某個行動背後的目的。
benefits.en: It clearly connects an action and its purpose.

benefits.zh: 它可以把行動和目的放在同一句中，令內容更直接、更緊湊。
So as to 常見於報告、商業文件、正式電郵、規則、政策及學術或議論文章。
benefits.en: It is suitable for formal writing.

benefits.zh: 使用 so as not to，可以直接說明做某事是為了防止另一件事發生。
benefits.en: It clearly expresses a purpose of preventing something.

benefits.zh: 它提供另一種表達目的的方法，避免反覆使用 because、so that、in order to 或 to + verb。

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using so as to or so as not to to express its purpose.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 so as to 或 so as not to 改寫以下句子，以表達行動的目的。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: I went to the library because I wanted to borrow a reference book.
questions.promptZh: 我去了圖書館，因為我想借一本參考書。
questions.answer: I went to the library so as to borrow a reference book.
questions.answerZh: 我去了圖書館，以借閱一本參考書。
questions.highlight: I went to the library so as to borrow a reference book.

questions.prompt: Lily got up early so that she could catch the first bus.
questions.promptZh: 莉莉早起，以便趕上第一班巴士。
questions.answer: Lily got up early so as to catch the first bus.
questions.answerZh: 莉莉早起，以趕上第一班巴士。
questions.highlight: Lily got up early so as to catch the first bus.

questions.prompt: Tom needed to ask about the homework, so he called his teacher.
questions.promptZh: 湯姆需要詢問功課的事情，所以他打電話給老師。
questions.answer: Tom called his teacher so as to ask about the homework.
questions.answerZh: 湯姆打電話給老師，以詢問功課的事情。
questions.highlight: Tom called his teacher so as to ask about the homework.

questions.prompt: Mia opened the window because she wanted to let some fresh air in.
